headlines.headline: 2026 NFL mock draft: Schrager projects 32 first-round picks
headlines.description: Peter Schrager leans on his intel after last week's annual league meeting to project picks in the NFL draft. Here's where things stand right now in Round 1.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL mock draft with all trades: Deals for Round 1 picks
headlines.description: We proposed 32 trades to shake up Round 1 -- one at every slot -- including deals that involve J.J. McCarthy and Maxx Crosby.

headlines.description: Here are 10 notes from around the Patriots and NFL this week.
